name: TA Baltimore South #151
description: Full-service travel center at I-95 Exit 41A (MD 175), the only true truck stop on this stretch. Offers 24-hour diesel, hundreds of truck parking spaces, showers, a Country Pride restaurant, truck service bays, and an on-site CAT Scale.

name: CAT Scale at TA Baltimore South Jessup
description: Certified CAT Scale located at the TA Baltimore South travel center, I-95 & Route 175 (Exit 41A). Listed on the CAT Scale locator for Jessup, MD.

name: I-95/I-495 Commercial Vehicle Weigh & Inspection Station (MSP CVED)
description: Fixed truck weigh and inspection station on the eastern Capital Beltway (I-95/I-495) near College Park, operated by the Maryland State Police Commercial Vehicle Enforcement Division. All commercial vehicles over 5 tons must weigh.

name: Maryland I-95 North Welcome Center & Rest Area
description: MDOT SHA welcome center and rest area on I-95 northbound near Savage (between Exits 35 and 38), with designated truck, RV and bus parking, a dump station, restrooms and vending. Rest area open 24/7.

name: Maryland I-95 South Welcome Center & Rest Area
description: MDOT SHA welcome center and rest area on I-95 southbound in Howard County (between MD 32 and MD 216), expanded to about 60 truck parking spaces via a federally funded 2020s project. Rest area open 24/7.

name: Columbia Fleet Service, Inc.
description: Full-service truck and trailer repair shop near I-95 Exit 41A offering 24-hour roadside assistance, heavy-duty towing and recovery, and preventive maintenance for the Jessup/Elkridge/Baltimore corridor.

name: Maryland Truck Tire Services Inc
description: Commercial truck tire and auto repair shop on Washington Blvd (US 1) near I-95 in Jessup, serving the Baltimore/Jessup/Brooklyn Park area with new, used and recap truck tires and service.

name: Menendez Road Service
description: 24/7 mobile truck tire repair and roadside service covering the I-95 corridor in Jessup and Elkridge, offering tire patching, tire swaps, fuel delivery and battery service within the DC/MD/VA area.

name: Heavy Towing Baltimore (BBT & Recovery)
description: 24-hour heavy-duty truck towing and recovery plus mobile truck repair serving I-95, I-695, I-97 and I-895 through the south Baltimore/Elkridge stretch of the corridor.

name: VIP Quality Express Truck Wash
description: Semi truck and trailer wash facility in Jessup near I-95 Exit 41A serving commercial vehicles in the Baltimore/Jessup area.

name: A.B. CDL Training
description: CDL training school in Laurel operating since 2002, providing Class B CDL instruction with passenger and school-bus endorsements near the I-95/Route 198 corridor.

name: Prince George's Community College CDL Training (Laurel Center)
description: Community college CDL (commercial truck driver) training program offered at the PGCC Laurel College Center near the I-95/Route 198 area.

name: North American Trade Schools (CDL Program)
description: FMCSA-registered trade school in the Baltimore area offering Class A and Class B CDL truck-driving programs with on-campus CDL testing, serving the south Baltimore/I-95 region.

name: Maryland House Travel Plaza
address: I-95 Median Service Plaza, Mile Marker 82
description: MDTA-operated I-95 (JFK Highway) median travel plaza serving both directions, with a Sunoco fueling station, a food court, convenience store, and car/truck parking.

name: Chesapeake House Travel Plaza
address: John F. Kennedy Memorial Hwy, I-95 Median Service Plaza, Mile Marker 97
description: MDTA-operated I-95 median travel plaza with a 24/7 Sunoco fuel station, EV charging, a food court (KFC, Pizza Hut, Wendy's, Earl of Sandwich, Auntie Anne's), market, and truck parking.

name: TA Baltimore #216
description: Full-service TA travel center near I-95 Exit 57 in southeast Baltimore with 24-hour diesel, a CAT Scale, TA truck service/tire repair, deli, showers and laundry, and roughly 181 truck parking spaces.

name: Pilot Travel Center #290
description: Pilot travel center at I-95 Exit 93 (MD 222) with 24-hour diesel, 7 diesel lanes, a CAT Scale, Subway, showers, and about 20 truck parking spaces.

name: Flying J Travel Center #784
description: Flying J travel center at I-95 Exit 100 with 12 diesel lanes, a CAT Scale, Denny's, showers, and roughly 100 truck parking spaces.

name: Flying J Travel Center #875
description: Flying J travel center at I-95 Exit 109A on Belle Hill Road with diesel lanes, a CAT Scale, showers, convenience store, and truck parking; adjacent to Blue Beacon and Boss Truck Shop.

name: TA Elkton #019
description: TA travel center at I-95 Exit 109B with BP diesel, 10 fuel lanes, a CAT Scale, TA Truck Service (3 bays, tire repair), Country Pride restaurant and Subway, 10 showers, laundry, and about 151 truck parking spaces.

name: CAT Scale at TA Baltimore
description: Certified CAT Scale for weighing trucks located at the TA Baltimore travel center off I-95 Exit 57.

name: CAT Scale at Pilot Perryville
description: Certified CAT Scale at the Pilot Travel Center off I-95 Exit 93 in Perryville.

name: CAT Scale at Flying J North East
description: Certified CAT Scale at the Flying J travel center off I-95 Exit 100 in North East.

name: CAT Scale at Flying J Elkton
description: Certified CAT Scale at the Flying J travel center on Belle Hill Road off I-95 Exit 109A.

name: CAT Scale at TA Elkton
description: Certified CAT Scale at the TA travel center off I-95 Exit 109B in Elkton.

name: Blue Beacon Truck Wash of Elkton
description: Commercial truck and trailer wash off I-95 Exit 109A next to the Flying J on Belle Hill Road, offering exterior tractor/trailer washing, trailer washouts, Rain-X, and engine wash.

name: Boss Truck Shop (Elkton)
description: In-shop and mobile commercial truck, trailer, and tire repair at the Flying J on Belle Hill Road off I-95 Exit 109A, carrying multiple major tire brands with 24-hour breakdown service.

name: TA Truck Service (Elkton)
description: On-site truck service shop at TA Elkton (I-95 Exit 109B) with 3 bays offering tire repair/replacement and mechanical repairs; listed BFGoodrich/Michelin commercial tire dealer.

name: I-95 Perryville Truck Weigh & Inspection Station (Northbound)
address: John F. Kennedy Memorial Highway (I-95 NB)
description: MDTA/Maryland State Police fixed truck weigh and inspection station on I-95 northbound near the Susquehanna River Bridge in Perryville; part of the PrePass network.

name: I-95 Perryville Truck Weigh & Inspection Station (Southbound)
address: 15 Turnpike Drive (I-95 SB), John F. Kennedy Memorial Highway
description: MDTA/Maryland State Police fixed truck weigh and inspection station on I-95 southbound at mile 93 near the Susquehanna River Bridge in Perryville; PrePass-equipped.

name: Days Inn by Wyndham Perryville
description: Budget hotel at I-95 Exit 93 next to the Pilot travel plaza with a large designated truck parking area (30+ spaces) and an adjacent 24-hour Denny's.

name: Elkton Lodge
description: Budget motel on Belle Hill Road off I-95 Exit 109A, adjacent to the Flying J truck stop, that allows guests to park a tractor and trailer in its lot.

name: Maryland House Travel Plaza Truck Parking
address: I-95 Median Service Plaza, Mile Marker 82
description: Dedicated truck/tractor-trailer parking at the MDTA Maryland House median travel plaza on I-95, accessible from both directions, with fuel, food court, and restrooms on site.

name: Chesapeake House Travel Plaza Truck Parking
address: I-95 Median Service Plaza, Mile Marker 97, John F. Kennedy Memorial Hwy
description: Dedicated truck/tractor-trailer parking at the MDTA Chesapeake House median travel plaza on I-95, accessible both directions, with 24/7 fuel, food court, and restrooms.

name: Vintage Wrecker Service
description: 24-hour heavy-duty towing and recovery service covering the I-95 corridor through Perryville, North East, Elkton, Aberdeen, and Havre de Grace.

name: Cecil College Truck Driver Training (CDL)
address: Elkton Station, 107 Railroad Avenue (classroom); North East Campus range
description: PTDI-certified Class A/B CDL training program near I-95, with classroom instruction in Elkton and behind-the-wheel training at the North East campus.

name: Harford Community College Commercial Truck Driving (CDL)
description: Harford County community college CDL program serving the I-95 corridor, offering Class A commercial driver training (classes run in partnership at Cecil College).

name: All-State Career School (Baltimore)
description: Career school near I-95 Exit 57 in southeast Baltimore offering CDL Class A tractor-trailer driver training.
